sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104207" key="toka/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τοκ-άω</orth>, <sense id="n104207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be near delivery,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοκῶσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:449" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">449</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
